paper_title: Unconsolidated Samples Analysis from DSDP Leg 96, Site 615

methods.description: Collection and preparation of unconsolidated samples of sands and muds from DSDP Leg 96, Site 615, to study inorganic geochemical, mineralogical, and geochronological variability.

steps.description: Collected unconsolidated samples of sands and muds from DSDP Leg 96, Site 615, from below and above a regional seismic horizon (H20) within the Mississippi Fan.
steps.searchable_summary: collect samples from specified depths at DSDP Leg 96, Site 615

steps.description: Pulverized mud samples to 75 microns in Cr steel.

methods.description: Determination of sand mineralogy and analysis of mud samples for major and trace elements.

steps.description: Sand mineralogy was determined by 300-grain petrographic point counts on a grid with 1 mm spacing, where thin sections were stained for potassium feldspar and plagioclase feldspar using sodium cobaltinitrite and barium chloride plus potassium rhodizonate, respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: perform petrographic point counts and stain thin sections for mineral analysis

steps.description: Analyzed pulverized mud samples for major and trace elements by whole-sample ore grade x-ray fluorescence (XRF), and exploration grade inductively-coupled plasma mass spectrometry (ICP-MS) and inductively-coupled plasma atomic emission spectroscopy (ICP-AES) at SGS Mineral Analytical Services.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze mud samples using XRF, ICP-MS, and ICP-AES

methods.description: Integration and analysis of new and published Detrital Zircon (DZ) samples for geochronological studies.

steps.description: Integrated six new Detrital Zircon (DZ) samples and one published sample from sediment cores recovered from the deep-sea Mississippi fan.
steps.searchable_summary: integrate new and published DZ samples from sediment cores

steps.description: Selected a subset of zircon grains for U-Pb crystallization and U-Th/He exhumation ages of individual zircon crystals in Mississippi fan sands.
steps.searchable_summary: select zircon grains for U-Pb and U-Th/He dating
